ci_prompt.description: Custom prompt for CI fixes. If blank, a default prompt will be used.

description.description: Free-form description of the work to be done. Used as the prompt passed to the agent.

github_integration.description: GitHub integration the agent uses to clone and open pull requests against `repository`.

internal.description: If true, this task is for internal use and should not be exposed to end users.

json_schema.description: JSON schema for the task. This is used to validate the output of the task.

origin_product.description:
PostHog product or surface that created this task (e.g. error_tracking, slack, user_created).

* `error_tracking` - Error Tracking
* `eval_clusters` - Eval Clusters
* `user_created` - User Created
* `automation` - Automation
* `slack` - Slack
* `support_queue` - Support Queue
* `session_summaries` - Session Summaries
* `signal_report` - Signal Report
* `mcp` - MCP

signal_report_task_relationship.description:
When linking a task to a signal report, which SignalReportTask relationship row to create. Only `implementation` is supported via the public API.

* `implementation` - Implementation

title.description: Short human-readable title. Auto-generated from `description` when omitted.

title_manually_set.description: True when the title was provided by the caller; False when auto-generated from `description`.
